title: Seattle, WA - Berlin Wall Slab - Roadside America
content: Seattle, Washington: Berlin Wall Slab. Wall slab pays tribute to Boeing's role in the 1948 Berlin Airlift, although the Berlin Wall wasn't built until 1961.
